---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for RapidTicket
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant context, such as affected screens, printer models, or network constraints.
